---
title: "From the Author's Desk"
listing:
  - id: listing-all
    contents:
      - "posts/**/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    categories: false
    date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
    feed: true
    fields: [title, author, date, image, description, categories]
    image-height: "200px"
    max-description-length: 200
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
  - id: listing-essays
    contents:
      - "posts/**/*.md"
    include:
      categories: ["essay"]
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    categories: false
    date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
    fields: [title, author, date, image, description]
    image-height: "200px"
    max-description-length: 200
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
  - id: listing-community
    contents:
      - "posts/**/*.md"
    include:
      categories: ["community"]
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    categories: false
    date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
    fields: [title, author, date, image, description]
    image-height: "200px"
    max-description-length: 200
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
  - id: listing-handson
    contents:
      - "posts/**/*.md"
    include:
      categories: ["hands-on"]
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    categories: false
    date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
    fields: [title, author, date, image, description]
    image-height: "200px"
    max-description-length: 200
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block: none
    css: newsletter.css
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<div class="newsletter-hero">
  <div class="newsletter-hero-content">
    <p class="newsletter-eyebrow">NEWSLETTER</p>
    <h1 class="newsletter-title">From the<br/>Author's Desk.</h1>
    <p class="newsletter-tagline">The forces shaping how AI systems are built — from the people engineering them.</p>
    <p class="newsletter-stats" id="newsletter-stats">14 issues · 1000+ subscribers</p>
    <script>
    // Load dynamic stats if available; if the fetch or regex fails, the
    // static fallback above stays in place.
    fetch('_stats.yml').then(r => r.text()).then(txt => {
      const issues = txt.match(/issue_count:\s*(\d+)/);
      const subs = txt.match(/subscriber_display:\s*"([^"]+)"/);
      if (issues && subs) {
        document.getElementById('newsletter-stats').textContent =
          issues[1] + ' issues · ' + subs[1] + ' subscribers';
      }
    }).catch(() => {});
    </script>

    <!-- Subscribe button — triggers shared modal -->
    <div class="newsletter-subscribe-form">
      <button onclick="openModal()" class="newsletter-subscribe-btn-hero">Subscribe — it's free</button>
      <p class="newsletter-form-note">No spam · Unsubscribe anytime</p>
    </div>

    <p class="newsletter-cta">
      <a href="https://buttondown.com/mlsysbook/rss" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-rss-btn"><i class="fas fa-rss"></i> RSS Feed</a>
      <a href="https://buttondown.com/mlsysbook/archive/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-rss-btn"><i class="fas fa-archive"></i> Full Archive</a>
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Tab Navigation ── -->
<div class="newsletter-tabs-wrapper">
  <nav class="newsletter-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Newsletter categories">
    <button class="newsletter-tab active" role="tab" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0" data-tab="all">All</button>
    <button class="newsletter-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" tabindex="0" data-tab="essays">Essays</button>
    <button class="newsletter-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" tabindex="0" data-tab="community">Community</button>
    <button class="newsletter-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" tabindex="0" data-tab="handson">Hands On</button>
  </nav>
</div>

<!-- ── Tab Descriptions ── -->
<div class="newsletter-tab-desc-wrapper">
  <div class="newsletter-tab-desc active" data-desc="all">
    <p>Essays, community stories, and project updates — everything from the desk.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="newsletter-tab-desc" data-desc="essays">
    <p><strong>Original essays on the shifts reshaping AI engineering.</strong> Each piece names a change most people miss, backs it with evidence, and explains what it means for anyone building or leading in technology. These are the pieces worth forwarding to a colleague.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="newsletter-tab-desc" data-desc="community">
    <p><strong>The people building AI systems around the world.</strong> Students shipping real hardware projects, educators bringing ML systems into new classrooms, and practitioners pushing the field forward. Every spotlight is also an invitation: <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeuZJ7XZh7NO0zGfS1HUhDyviyEwZxZjs9Ebt4O4NhyKbXQIQ/viewform" target="_blank" rel="noopener">want to be featured next?</a></p>
  </div>
  <div class="newsletter-tab-desc" data-desc="handson">
    <p><strong>Build it yourself.</strong> TinyTorch modules, hardware kit programs, interactive labs, and new textbook chapters. Everything here is something you can use, run, or teach with. Because you cannot debug what you did not build.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Tab Switching Logic (with keyboard nav + URL hash) ── -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.newsletter-tab');
  const descs = document.querySelectorAll('.newsletter-tab-desc');
  const panels = {
    all:       document.getElementById('listing-listing-all'),
    essays:    document.getElementById('listing-listing-essays'),
    community: document.getElementById('listing-listing-community'),
    handson:   document.getElementById('listing-listing-handson')
  };

  function activateTab(target) {
    tabs.forEach(t => { t.classList.remove('active'); t.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false'); });
    descs.forEach(d => d.classList.remove('active'));
    Object.entries(panels).forEach(([key, el]) => {
      if (el) el.style.display = key === target ? '' : 'none';
    });
    const activeTab = document.querySelector(`.newsletter-tab[data-tab="${target}"]`);
    const activeDesc = document.querySelector(`.newsletter-tab-desc[data-desc="${target}"]`);
    if (activeTab) { activeTab.classList.add('active'); activeTab.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true'); }
    if (activeDesc) activeDesc.classList.add('active');
  }

  // Read URL hash on load (e.g. #essays, #community, #updates)
  const hash = location.hash.replace('#', '');
  activateTab(panels[hash] ? hash : 'all');

  // Click handler
  tabs.forEach(tab => {
    tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
      const target = this.dataset.tab;
      activateTab(target);
      history.replaceState(null, '', target === 'all' ? location.pathname : '#' + target);
    });
  });

  // Keyboard: arrow keys navigate between tabs
  tabs.forEach((tab, i) => {
    tab.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      let next;
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') next = tabs[(i + 1) % tabs.length];
      else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') next = tabs[(i - 1 + tabs.length) % tabs.length];
      if (next) { next.focus(); next.click(); e.preventDefault(); }
    });
  });

  // Stamp data-cat-value on category badges so CSS can target them
  document.querySelectorAll('.listing-category').forEach(el => {
    el.setAttribute('data-cat-value', el.textContent.trim());
  });
});
</script>
```

::: {#listing-all}
:::

::: {#listing-essays}
:::

::: {#listing-community}
:::

::: {#listing-handson}
:::

```{=html}
<!-- ── Get Involved ── -->
<div class="newsletter-get-involved">
  <p class="newsletter-involve-eyebrow">GET INVOLVED</p>
  <h3 class="newsletter-involve-title">Be part of what we're building</h3>
  <p class="newsletter-involve-text">This community grows because people show up — students, educators, engineers, researchers. Here's how to get involved:</p>
  <div class="newsletter-involve-grid">
    <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeuZJ7XZh7NO0zGfS1HUhDyviyEwZxZjs9Ebt4O4NhyKbXQIQ/viewform" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-involve-card">
      <i class="fas fa-microphone-alt newsletter-involve-icon" style="color: var(--nl-accent);"></i>
      <strong>Present your work</strong>
      <span>Share your project at a monthly TinyML Show &amp; Tell session.</span>
    </a>
    <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-involve-card">
      <i class="fas fa-microchip newsletter-involve-icon" style="color: #4a90c4;"></i>
      <strong>Teach with us</strong>
      <span>Get hardware kits and open curriculum for your course.</span>
    </a>
    <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-involve-card">
      <i class="fab fa-github newsletter-involve-icon" style="color: #3d9e5a;"></i>
      <strong>Contribute</strong>
      <span>The textbook and TinyTorch are open source. Every PR makes the field stronger.</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Bottom CTA ── -->
<div class="newsletter-bottom-cta">
  <p class="newsletter-bottom-text">Enjoyed reading? Get new issues delivered to your inbox.</p>
  <button onclick="openModal()" class="newsletter-bottom-btn">Subscribe →</button>
</div>
```

:::
